description_long: This object is a large, modern sword with a distinctive, aggressive design. The blade is elongated, single-edged, and features three large cutouts along its length, likely for weight reduction and visual impact. The blade is primarily black, with a metallic sheen, and transitions into a gold and black guard that is angular and mechanical in appearance. The handle is cylindrical, metallic, and features a textured grip with a gold pommel at the end. The overall construction suggests a blend of steel and possibly composite materials, giving it a futuristic or stylized look. The sword is visually striking and would stand out in an urban or display context.
description: A large, black and gold modern sword with a single-edged blade featuring three cutouts and a mechanical-style guard and handle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blade, three large cutouts, and the gold-black guard and handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view showing the thinness of the blade and the cylindrical handle, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same blade cutouts and guard details visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view highlighting the straightness of the blade and the round, textured handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, metallic, textured grip, gold pommel
attribute_ornamentation: gold accents and mechanical styling on guard and handle
